characters.name: Mr. Marquez
characters.description: Mr. MarquezProfessionFactory WorkerFamily membersLucia- WifeGabrielle Solis- DaughterUnnamed SonUnnamed DaughterCelia Solis- GrandaughterJuanita Solis- Legal GranddaughterGrace Sanchez- Biological daughterCarlos Solis- Son-in-lawVictor Lang- Son-in-lawMr. Marquezis the biological father ofGabrielle Solis. InSmiles of a Summer Night, Gaby tells Lynette that he died of cancer when she was younger. He is again mentioned and seen in a family photo inYou Gotta Get a Gimmickwhen Gaby tells Carlos about her rough childhood.
